<a id="class-editorexportpreset"></a>

# EditorExportPreset

**Inherits:** [RefCounted](class_refcounted.md#class-refcounted) **<** [Object](class_object.md#class-object)

Export preset configuration.

## Description

Represents the configuration of an export preset, as created by the editor's export dialog. An **EditorExportPreset** instance is intended to be used a read-only configuration passed to the [EditorExportPlatform](class_editorexportplatform.md#class-editorexportplatform) methods when exporting the project.

## Method Descriptions

<a id="class-editorexportpreset-method-are-advanced-options-enabled"></a>

[bool](class_bool.md#class-bool) **are_advanced_options_enabled**()  [🔗](#class-editorexportpreset-method-are-advanced-options-enabled)

Returns `true` if the "Advanced" toggle is enabled in the export dialog.

---

<a id="class-editorexportpreset-method-get-custom-features"></a>

[String](class_string.md#class-string) **get_custom_features**()  [🔗](#class-editorexportpreset-method-get-custom-features)

Returns a comma-separated list of custom features added to this preset, as a string. See [Feature tags](../tutorials/export/feature_tags.md) in the documentation for more information.

---

<a id="class-editorexportpreset-method-get-customized-files"></a>

[Dictionary](class_dictionary.md#class-dictionary) **get_customized_files**()  [🔗](#class-editorexportpreset-method-get-customized-files)

Returns a dictionary of files selected in the "Resources" tab of the export dialog. The dictionary's keys are file paths, and its values are the corresponding export modes: `"strip"`, `"keep"`, or `"remove"`. See also [get_file_export_mode()](#class-editorexportpreset-method-get-file-export-mode).

---

<a id="class-editorexportpreset-method-get-customized-files-count"></a>

[int](class_int.md#class-int) **get_customized_files_count**()  [🔗](#class-editorexportpreset-method-get-customized-files-count)

Returns the number of files selected in the "Resources" tab of the export dialog.

---

<a id="class-editorexportpreset-method-get-encrypt-directory"></a>

[bool](class_bool.md#class-bool) **get_encrypt_directory**()  [🔗](#class-editorexportpreset-method-get-encrypt-directory)

Returns `true` if PCK directory encryption is enabled in the export dialog.

---

<a id="class-editorexportpreset-method-get-encrypt-pck"></a>

[bool](class_bool.md#class-bool) **get_encrypt_pck**()  [🔗](#class-editorexportpreset-method-get-encrypt-pck)

Returns `true` if PCK encryption is enabled in the export dialog.

---

<a id="class-editorexportpreset-method-get-encryption-ex-filter"></a>

[String](class_string.md#class-string) **get_encryption_ex_filter**()  [🔗](#class-editorexportpreset-method-get-encryption-ex-filter)

Returns file filters to exclude during PCK encryption.

---

<a id="class-editorexportpreset-method-get-encryption-in-filter"></a>

[String](class_string.md#class-string) **get_encryption_in_filter**()  [🔗](#class-editorexportpreset-method-get-encryption-in-filter)

Returns file filters to include during PCK encryption.

---

<a id="class-editorexportpreset-method-get-encryption-key"></a>

[String](class_string.md#class-string) **get_encryption_key**()  [🔗](#class-editorexportpreset-method-get-encryption-key)

Returns PCK encryption key.

---

<a id="class-editorexportpreset-method-get-exclude-filter"></a>

[String](class_string.md#class-string) **get_exclude_filter**()  [🔗](#class-editorexportpreset-method-get-exclude-filter)

Returns file filters to exclude during export.

---

<a id="class-editorexportpreset-method-get-export-filter"></a>

[ExportFilter](#enum-editorexportpreset-exportfilter) **get_export_filter**()  [🔗](#class-editorexportpreset-method-get-export-filter)

Returns export file filter mode selected in the "Resources" tab of the export dialog.

---

<a id="class-editorexportpreset-method-get-export-path"></a>

[String](class_string.md#class-string) **get_export_path**()  [🔗](#class-editorexportpreset-method-get-export-path)

Returns export target path.

---

<a id="class-editorexportpreset-method-get-file-export-mode"></a>

[FileExportMode](#enum-editorexportpreset-fileexportmode) **get_file_export_mode**(path: [String](class_string.md#class-string), default: [FileExportMode](#enum-editorexportpreset-fileexportmode) = 0)  [🔗](#class-editorexportpreset-method-get-file-export-mode)

Returns file export mode for the specified file.

---

<a id="class-editorexportpreset-method-get-files-to-export"></a>

[PackedStringArray](class_packedstringarray.md#class-packedstringarray) **get_files_to_export**()  [🔗](#class-editorexportpreset-method-get-files-to-export)

Returns array of files to export.

---

<a id="class-editorexportpreset-method-get-include-filter"></a>

[String](class_string.md#class-string) **get_include_filter**()  [🔗](#class-editorexportpreset-method-get-include-filter)

Returns file filters to include during export.

---

<a id="class-editorexportpreset-method-get-or-env"></a>

[Variant](class_variant.md#class-variant) **get_or_env**(name: [StringName](class_stringname.md#class-stringname), env_var: [String](class_string.md#class-string))  [🔗](#class-editorexportpreset-method-get-or-env)

Returns export option value or value of environment variable if it is set.

---

<a id="class-editorexportpreset-method-get-patches"></a>

[PackedStringArray](class_packedstringarray.md#class-packedstringarray) **get_patches**()  [🔗](#class-editorexportpreset-method-get-patches)

Returns the list of packs on which to base a patch export on.

---

<a id="class-editorexportpreset-method-get-preset-name"></a>

[String](class_string.md#class-string) **get_preset_name**()  [🔗](#class-editorexportpreset-method-get-preset-name)

Returns this export preset's name.

---

<a id="class-editorexportpreset-method-get-project-setting"></a>

[Variant](class_variant.md#class-variant) **get_project_setting**(name: [StringName](class_stringname.md#class-stringname)) [🔗](#class-editorexportpreset-method-get-project-setting)

Returns the value of the setting identified by `name` using export preset feature tag overrides instead of current OS features.

---

<a id="class-editorexportpreset-method-get-script-export-mode"></a>

[ScriptExportMode](#enum-editorexportpreset-scriptexportmode) **get_script_export_mode**()  [🔗](#class-editorexportpreset-method-get-script-export-mode)

Returns the export mode used by GDScript files. `0` for "Text", `1` for "Binary tokens", and `2` for "Compressed binary tokens (smaller files)".

---

<a id="class-editorexportpreset-method-get-version"></a>

[String](class_string.md#class-string) **get_version**(name: [StringName](class_stringname.md#class-stringname), windows_version: [bool](class_bool.md#class-bool))  [🔗](#class-editorexportpreset-method-get-version)

Returns the preset's version number, or fall back to the [ProjectSettings.application/config/version](class_projectsettings.md#class-projectsettings-property-application-config-version) project setting if set to an empty string.

If `windows_version` is `true`, formats the returned version number to be compatible with Windows executable metadata.

---

<a id="class-editorexportpreset-method-has"></a>

[bool](class_bool.md#class-bool) **has**(property: [StringName](class_stringname.md#class-stringname))  [🔗](#class-editorexportpreset-method-has)

Returns `true` if the preset has the property named `property`.

---

<a id="class-editorexportpreset-method-has-export-file"></a>

[bool](class_bool.md#class-bool) **has_export_file**(path: [String](class_string.md#class-string)) [🔗](#class-editorexportpreset-method-has-export-file)

Returns `true` if the file at the specified `path` will be exported.

---

<a id="class-editorexportpreset-method-is-dedicated-server"></a>

[bool](class_bool.md#class-bool) **is_dedicated_server**()  [🔗](#class-editorexportpreset-method-is-dedicated-server)

Returns `true` if the dedicated server export mode is selected in the export dialog.

---

<a id="class-editorexportpreset-method-is-runnable"></a>

[bool](class_bool.md#class-bool) **is_runnable**()  [🔗](#class-editorexportpreset-method-is-runnable)

Returns `true` if the "Runnable" toggle is enabled in the export dialog.
